title: Dubai gold price climbs on March 27: 24K at around Dh624 per gram as inflation fears drive buying
summary_full: Dubai's gold market sees a strong recovery. Gold prices are up today, March 27, 2026. This rise is linked to global inflation worries and a weaker US dollar. Buyers are still active, but many are choosing lighter pieces. Experts expect gold prices to remain volatile but supported in the near future.
